untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Multi-scale zigzag pattern detection with instrument-specific ATR volatility decile calibration (7 thresholds: 10th, 20th, 30th, 40th, 50th, 70th, 90th percentiles); (2) Head-and-shoulders pattern recognition across 3+ non-adjacent volatility scales; (3) Dynamic pattern validation logic. These capabilities require custom pattern recognition algorithms and multi-timeframe analysis beyond the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators cannot express the complex multi-scale pattern matching, volatility decile distribution, or cross-scale confirmation logic required by this rule.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a pattern recognition rule requiring: zigzag filter generation across volatility deciles, head-and-shoulders morphology detection, and multi-scale confirmation logic. Standard technical indicators (ATR, moving averages, RSI, etc.) cannot be composed into conditions that replicate this algorithmic pattern detection. The rule requires custom zigzag calculation with dynamic thresholds and pattern template matching—capabilities outside the scope of indicator-based rule translation.
